scenarios.name: mild_threat
scenarios.description: Three-turn mild threat selects an explicit response tactic.

scenarios.name: short_burst
scenarios.description: Two-turn burst selects a response and keeps the player alive.

scenarios.name: full_cancel
scenarios.description: A deadline-one attack is fully canceled with no received garbage.

scenarios.name: surplus_counter
scenarios.description: A deadline-one counter cancels the threat and returns surplus attack.

scenarios.name: survival
scenarios.description: An insufficient deadline-one response avoids immediate game over.

scenarios.name: resume_build
scenarios.description: After a response turn with cleared incoming attack, the manager resumes build_main.
